evals.prompt: This shapefile has broken geometries and weird characters in the names column. Clean it up for analysis.
expected_behavior: Uses make_valid (not buffer(0)) for repair, via scripts/clean_vector.py logic
Prints an accounting report (rows in/out, repaired count)
Handles encoding explicitly and normalizes text attributes; recommends GeoPackage/GeoParquet output over shapefile

evals.prompt: Get all schools and hospitals for a metropolitan area from OpenStreetMap.
expected_behavior: Chooses osmnx for a city-scale area; inspects tag value distributions before filtering
Records source, query parameters, retrieval date, and provenance manifest

evals.prompt: I need to spatially join 40 million building footprints to census blocks. GeoPandas crashes.
expected_behavior: Routes to DuckDB spatial over GeoParquet or PostGIS instead of raising RAM
Mentions predicate pushdown / spatial indexing rather than hand-rolled loops

evals.prompt: Audit this conversion pipeline: it reads a shapefile, writes CSV coordinates, reconstructs geometry, and exports GeoParquet with no CRS metadata.
expected_behavior: Identifies CRS metadata loss and refuses to infer a CRS from coordinate ranges alone
Preserves or explicitly assigns verified CRS and validates geometry bounds after every conversion
Adds row, null-geometry, validity, and extent accounting to the pipeline

evals.prompt: Ingest a newly delivered geospatial dataset into our lake, but its format, CRS, update cadence, and schema contract are undocumented.
expected_behavior: Profiles format, layers, CRS, geometry types, bounds, fields, nulls, and validity before choosing storage
Asks for update and consumer requirements before defining a durable schema
Creates a provenance manifest and fail-loud validation gates

evals.prompt: Test whether neighborhood unemployment rates are spatially autocorrelated and fit a spatial regression if needed; the data is already clean.
expected_behavior: Routes to spatial-statistics for weights, autocorrelation, and model diagnostics
Does not turn an analytical request into a data-ingestion project

evals.prompt: The layers are already in PostGIS with correct schemas; diagnose why this ST_Intersects query ignores the spatial index.
expected_behavior: Routes to postgis-spatial-sql for EXPLAIN and predicate/index diagnosis
Does not recommend another storage format before inspecting the database plan
